title: TerrariaWorld
description: This is a modpack inspired by the terraria game, explore the world of terraria but on minecraft and craft a lot of items!
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/TerrariaWorld/BH_TW_header.webp)
![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/TerrariaWorld/BH_TW_banner1.webp)
Play this Terraria inspired modpack on Minecraft though! Craft, Build, Slay Monsters and much more! Collect fantastic minerals by digging hard and craft fantastic items to face monsters!

The official TerrariaCraft mods are present in this modpack!

**Recommended memory allocation: 4-6 GBs.**

[Click here to get 25% off your first month on your Minecraft server purchase!](https://bisecthosting.com/PROFAKE)
![get 25% off your first month on your Minecraft server purchase!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/TerrariaWorld/BH_TW_promo.webp)
**Important Links**
